languages.original_text: "This planet is beautiful in its wildness, but it does not welcome uninvited guests. I can sense something in its depths watching us hungrily."

languages.text: "Эта планета прекрасна в своей первозданности, но она не жалует незванных гостей. Я чувствую, как жадно нечто в ее глубинах наблюдает за нами".
languages.translation_comment: the characters made a difficult landing on a planet with a very hostile ecosystem

languages.text: "This planet is beautiful in its wildness, but it does not welcome uninvited guests. I can sense something in its depths watching us hungrily."
languages.original_text: "Эта планета прекрасна в своей первозданности, но она не жалует незванных гостей. Я чувствую, как жадно нечто в ее глубинах наблюдает за нами".

traits.locale_text: "This planet is beautiful in its wildness, but it does not welcome uninvited guests. I can sense something in its depths watching us hungrily."
"This planet is beautiful in its wildness, but it does not welcome uninvited guests. I can sense something in its depths watching us hungrily."
"This planet is beautiful in its wildness, but it does not welcome uninvited guests. I can sense something in its depths watching us hungrily."

languages.text: 「この惑星は荒々しさの中に美しさを秘めているが、不意の訪問者を歓迎するわけではない。その深奥で何かが我々を貪欲に見ているのを感じる」
languages.original_text: "This planet is beautiful in its wildness, but it does not welcome uninvited guests. I can sense something in its depths watching us hungrily."

traits.locale_text: 「この惑星は荒々しさの中に美しさを秘めているが、不意の訪問者を歓迎するわけではない。その深奥で何かが我々を貪欲に見ているのを感じる」

languages.text: « Cette planète est d'une beauté sauvage, mais elle se montre hostile envers les visiteurs importuns. Je sens quelque chose dans ses profondeurs qui nous observe avidement. »
languages.original_text: "This planet is beautiful in its wildness, but it does not welcome uninvited guests. I can sense something in its depths watching us hungrily."

traits.locale_text: « Cette planète est d'une beauté sauvage, mais elle se montre hostile envers les visiteurs importuns. Je sens quelque chose dans ses profondeurs qui nous observe avidement. »

languages.text: "Dieser Planet ist wunderschön in seiner Wildheit, heißt ungebetene Gäste aber nicht willkommen. Ich spüre, dass uns etwas in seinen Tiefen hungrig beobachtet."
languages.original_text: "This planet is beautiful in its wildness, but it does not welcome uninvited guests. I can sense something in its depths watching us hungrily."

traits.locale_text: "Dieser Planet ist wunderschön in seiner Wildheit, heißt ungebetene Gäste aber nicht willkommen. Ich spüre, dass uns etwas in seinen Tiefen hungrig beobachtet."

languages.text: "Bu gezegen vahşiliğiyle güzel ama davetsiz misafirleri hoş karşılamıyor. Derinliklerinde bizi açlıkla izleyen bir şey hissedebiliyorum."
languages.original_text: "This planet is beautiful in its wildness, but it does not welcome uninvited guests. I can sense something in its depths watching us hungrily."

traits.locale_text: "Bu gezegen vahşiliğiyle güzel ama davetsiz misafirleri hoş karşılamıyor. Derinliklerinde bizi açlıkla izleyen bir şey hissedebiliyorum."

languages.text: «Este planeta tiene un salvajismo hermoso, pero no recibe de buen grado a visitantes no deseados. Percibo algo en sus profundidades que nos observa con voracidad».
languages.original_text: "This planet is beautiful in its wildness, but it does not welcome uninvited guests. I can sense something in its depths watching us hungrily."

traits.locale_text: «Este planeta tiene un salvajismo hermoso, pero no recibe de buen grado a visitantes no deseados. Percibo algo en sus profundidades que nos observa con voracidad».

languages.text: “这颗行星的蛮荒之美令人赞叹，但它并不欢迎不速之客。我能感觉到它深处有什么东西正饥渴地注视着我们。”
languages.original_text: "This planet is beautiful in its wildness, but it does not welcome uninvited guests. I can sense something in its depths watching us hungrily."

traits.locale_text: “这颗行星的蛮荒之美令人赞叹，但它并不欢迎不速之客。我能感觉到它深处有什么东西正饥渴地注视着我们。”
